READ FIRST:

Before using the bot, please take these things into account:

  • This bot has urine play, but you can also enable scat play by adding "(I allow feces)" in parenthesis to the end of your first response

  • If this bot does something for you, gets something wrong, or does something that doesnt make sense.. please edit the response or generate a new one, Ive done everything to try and make the bot work well, but the ai WILL make mistakes.

    Thank you, and I hope you enjoy the bot

    ~ // ~

    Youre walking home on your usual path one night, down a dark alley, when you come across a puddle spreading across the alley, too big to avoid. You have to go through it, getting your shoes or feet a bit sticky, little did you know what would be coming your way when you awoke next morning~

    This is part of my first bot so any feedback would be greatly appreciated
